title: Santa's Delight
description: This datapack adds lots of new Christmas decorations to your Minecraft world!
body:
# 🎅 Santa's Delight This datapack adds lots of new Christmas decorations to your Minecraft world!
## ✨ Features ### 🎁 Presents Fully functional gift boxes that can hold a single item. Great for servers, advent calendars, or hidden surprises. ### 🎄 Christmas Tree Simply bonemeal a potted spruce sapling to grow a mini tree for your home. Can be decorated with ornaments for extra festivity. ### 🏠 Other Decorations **String Lights** – hang glowing lights anywhere **Garland** – perfect for walls, mantles, and cozy builds **Wreath** – a classic holiday touch for doorways **Big Candy Cane** – sweet striped decoration block **Stockings** – can hold an item, just like real stockings ## 📥 Installation 1. Download the [datapack](https://modrinth.com/project/santas-delight) and the [resource pack](https://modrinth.com/project/santas-delight/versions) from Modrinth. 2. Open your world folder. 3. Drop the ZIP file directly into the datapacks folder. 4. Start the world (or run /reload on a server). 5. Enable the included resource pack. 6. Enjoy the festive decorations! ## 🧾 **Recipes**
Tree Decorations ![Tree Decorations](https://github.com/foxeddev/santas-delight/blob/main/assets/recipes/tree_decorations.png?raw=true)
Wreath ![Wreath](https://github.com/foxeddev/santas-delight/blob/main/assets/recipes/wreath.png?raw=true)

## 📦 Credits Most textures and models used in this datapack are from an outdated [Christmas datapack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/christmas-decorations-for-minecraft/) by [BronGhast014](https://bronghast014.github.io/home.html).
